case_title: BRENDA BESDANSKY VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY BESDANSKY, BRENDA AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-08-2021 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$0.00 WAIVER) SERVED APR-06-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-08-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-08-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG PLAINTIFF BRENDA BESDANSKY IS PRESENT. CART REPORTER AUDRY SPINKA IS PRESENT ON ZOOM AND ASSISTS PLAINTIFF WITH CLOSED CAPTIONING. DEFENDANT CCSF, REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN, CLAIMS ADJUSTER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF BESDANSKY, BRENDA
